title: All Joy and No Fun
author: Jennifer Senior
customHTML:
<svg viewBox="0 0 1600 2400" preserveAspectRatio="xMidYMid slice" style="position:absolute;inset:0;width:100%;height:100%">
  <!-- A line graph of marital satisfaction over time. Starts high (ASH), drops dramatically at child arrival (RED drop), slowly recovers (ASH). The kid's birth is the single red event. -->
  <g transform="translate(160 1200)" fill="none">
    <g stroke="#cccccc" stroke-width="3" stroke-linecap="round">
      <path d="M 0 -150 L 200 -148 L 380 -142 L 480 -130"/>
    </g>
    <g stroke="#fc1c46" stroke-width="3" stroke-linecap="round">
      <path d="M 480 -130 L 520 -90 L 580 -30 L 640 50 L 700 110 L 760 130"/>
    </g>
    <g stroke="#cccccc" stroke-width="3" stroke-linecap="round">
      <path d="M 760 130 L 840 120 L 940 100 L 1040 70 L 1140 30 L 1240 0"/>
    </g>
    <!-- child arrival marker -->
    <circle cx="480" cy="-130" r="8" fill="#fc1c46"/>
    <line x1="480" y1="-150" x2="480" y2="240" stroke="#4c4c4c" stroke-width="1" stroke-dasharray="3 4"/>
    <text x="480" y="-180" text-anchor="middle" font-family="'Sui','Söhne','Inter',system-ui,sans-serif" font-size="13" font-weight="500" fill="#fc1c46" letter-spacing="0.2em">BABY</text>
    <text x="480" y="-200" text-anchor="middle" font-family="'Sui','Söhne','Inter',system-ui,sans-serif" font-size="11" font-weight="400" fill="#4c4c4c" letter-spacing="0.2em">ARRIVES</text>
    <!-- X axis -->
    <line x1="0" y1="240" x2="1280" y2="240" stroke="#4c4c4c" stroke-width="1"/>
    <g font-family="'Sui','Söhne','Inter',system-ui,sans-serif" font-size="12" fill="#4c4c4c" letter-spacing="0.18em">
      <text x="0" y="280">WEDDING</text>
      <text x="1280" y="280" text-anchor="end">EMPTY NEST</text>
    </g>
    <text x="-20" y="-145" text-anchor="end" font-family="'Sui','Söhne','Inter',system-ui,sans-serif" font-size="11" fill="#4c4c4c" letter-spacing="0.18em">MARITAL</text>
    <text x="-20" y="-130" text-anchor="end" font-family="'Sui','Söhne','Inter',system-ui,sans-serif" font-size="11" fill="#4c4c4c" letter-spacing="0.18em">JOY</text>
    <text x="700" y="60" text-anchor="middle" font-family="'Sui','Söhne','Inter',system-ui,sans-serif" font-size="14" font-weight="500" fill="#fc1c46" letter-spacing="0.18em">THE DROP</text>
  </g>
</svg>
rationale: Marital satisfaction over the parenting arc — ash line on the left (high), a sharp red drop at the moment a child arrives, then a slow ash climb back. 'BABY ARRIVES' marker is a dashed vertical, the red dot is the inflection. The composition IS the thesis: joy and no fun, plotted on one line.
